programs.title: True Terror With Robert Englund
programs.desc: The horror escalates as a Massachusetts family hunts for a hidden fortune in a haunted house; a farmer battles a devilish curse in Ohio; a greedy mortician faces the wrath of the dead after he defiles their graves in a corrupt scheme.

programs.title: True Terror With Robert Englund
programs.desc: Two aging ranch hands battle a flying maneater in the Arizona desert; a young Theodore Roosevelt trespasses into the lair of a half-human predator; and demonic entities prey upon villagers in rural Pennsylvania.

programs.title: True Terror With Robert Englund
programs.desc: An Arizona sheepherder hunts down a mysterious beast that killed his wife; a hairy giant stalks a Missouri farmer and his family; a medicine man battles evil spirits who devour human flesh.

programs.title: True Terror With Robert Englund
programs.desc: A man uncovers an unholy secret in Kansas; a factory worker confronts the witch he believes cursed him; a Philadelphia secretary is tormented by nightmares foretelling her death.

programs.sub_title: A Shadow Creature in Maine and More
programs.desc: A man encounters a shadow creature in his bedroom; an unidentified light is spotted above Fairbanks, Alaska; a Detroit brewery is visited by an angelic entity.

programs.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera
